titleStmt.title: SII 35.35: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 35. (A.R. No. 27 of 1950-51.) BOMBAY, BOMBAY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Prince of Wales Museum Slab No. HB. 7.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 36, Khara, Vaiśākha Puṇṇami, Monday, Vyatīpāta, lunar eclipse. The details of date equate with 1111 A.D., April 25.

It records the construction of a temple at Eleyapūruvadavaḷḷi by Māchiyakka, wife of Mahāsāmantādhipati Daṇḍanāyaka Muṭṭigalla-Chaṭṭōpādhyāya. States that the village was being governed by Malayamatīdēvi who is described as the piriyarasi of the king. Reviewed in ASR for 1936-37, p. 99.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.] jayatyāviṣkṟitaṁ viṣṇō¨rvvārāha kṣōbhitā¨rṇṇavaṁ
© dakṣiṇōṁnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . namassavitrē jagadēkacakṣuśē jagatprasūti sthitināśa hētavē [.] trayī mayāya
© ṇāṁta rāśiṇē viriṁcinārāyaṇaśaṁkarātmanē . śrībhuvanamaśēṣamaṁ vīra vṛtti yaṁ nijabhujapratāpadināḷuttaviralke
himadināsētuvaraṁ cāḷukyavikramādityanṛpaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
© rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōtta rābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamā
candrā¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamire . tatupūjyar . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . vidvajjana
hṛdayānandapradāyakanubhayamīmāṁsaratnākara ṣa kamaḷinīdivākaraṁ kāvyakēḷī sa rada rājahaṁsa cāṇakyamatamāṇikyāvataṁsa cā
ḷukyacakrēśvaraviśvāsaniḷayaṁ śivaprasādalabdhakī¨rttivyāptibhūvaḷayaṁ . saṁgīta cāturī caturānanaṁ . prativādivāraṇakēḷīpaṁcānanaṁ nāmādi samasta
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvasaṁpūjyarappa śrīmanmahāpradhāna piriyagrāharaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ muṭṭigallacaṭṭōpādhyāyar . © .
tribhuvanamalladēvaparipūjitaruddhayaśōvirājitar . śubhagakavīndra nditaraninitarunnatamāna mandara kavi bhavyapurandaraṁ manumunīndrasaṁmānayā
nadānakabhyabhinavakuḷaprasūtaratipūtarasā ninna mū¨rtigaḷalatrimunīśvara pavitrar sucaritraranyacāraputrar pātrīkṛtōdhyadamaḷinagōtra sutasa
mastadēvavidhātrar . Ene negaḻda vipravaṁśābdhinī vi navaṁśadavatāramanā yyasikṣata venintappa sayvanāvaṁ paḍeva karahaḍanālchāsirakaṁ śiramenisi
da grahāramukhatiḷakaṁ bittaripaḍe koggaṭanūrina dora niyamagrahāra mā ve . Alliya pra tama llanuta sakaḷaśāstravēdavidaccāsvallakṣmībhā jana
mellasadha ¨rbbhita catu ḷāḍhyār . Avaroḷage sakaḷaśāstrapravīṇa vidana pitabhaṭṭa trivikramanū¨rjjita trivikramanesada . Ā satya
vratana sarasvatigarundhatige migila susamaya sida nāgi jagakutsava riyase ppuda janaka
mudamuyise janakke kī¨rttimu ra negaḻdu
du muṭṭigallayya caṭṭadaṇḍādhipa riyaṁgiḍisutīśa trisamu panemalla śvara caṭṭadaṇḍēśvarananaḷaṁkarisi māciyakka negaḻdaḷ . ta dvige vadhu sadṛśa
śadvara nivahage nīsa jagadvarare śvakratā¨rthariva¨rgge samā
phaḷakēṁdra dhāriṇi satata pariya yaśatriga balada brata guṇadoḷu bhāvipoṁdaggaḷameṁdolave vogaḻda ta tyavratā
guṇadoḻdaṁ paḍeva siri ba ḷanisi mā ka li sida sirige nāga vanija vā¨rddhiyoḷ janayisidaḷ . vimaḷapari
triya raṇa ntenalla ramage vibhūpāvavolatiśaya śi bhā ha sippa vesava palasige dēśaṁ beḷadaḻigida kaḷa yakeyga dinavanatapa kvajāḷige
nucitavanāvaḷigaḷinaḷigaḷiṁpe gadina sa dēśavesevudu mātu jagavāḍeleya parvidavari ma rudyānanikāmaṁ vṛtā
digvikāṁtaṭakārāma bhuvanamaṇḍaḷavidita nānāviśēṣadiśākalpaka ppadaḻa menipudu nō¨rppa janada kaṇgamanaka . baḷasidanandanāvaḷigaḷiṁ baḷe
doppuva keyvolaṁgaḷiṁ lalitalatāgraha rinudhyadaśēṣa viśēṣasalkaḷākaḷita kada vagrahagaḷē maṁ goḷisuvudagrahāramukhamaṇḍanama da śōbhe
lada nāḷkaḷadruma kha pakamāḷe tenaka miśvarasē kaṇge tānedalenisi¨rppaḷ . Abhinava rarasasvabhāvasau
nda¨ryadiṁ kaḷāpariṇa bhū vanamalla mahi caṁge malayāma varata paramakalyāṇābhyudayabhōginī dvitīyalakṣmīsa
mānakaḷahaṁsayende Anavarata vitaraṇa nānāthava midappa rāmarājyābhyudayaśōbhanānēkaśubhalakṣaṇalakṣmītāṁgi
rāya sa¨rbbajñana¨rddāṁgimṛdumadhuravacanaracanacaturakaḷāḷāpe gōtraratnapradīpe śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsiniyarappa śrīmadabhinavasarasvatiśrīmatpiriyara
si paṭṭamādēvi malayamatidēviyar śrīmanmahāgrahāravalayapū¨rvvadavaḷḷiyaṁ tribhōgābhyantara siddhiyiṁ su dina nāyata pū¨rvva ḷēhagra
gadē ḷatakaṁcakra rū pā nēkaśāstra pāragarakhiḷa vida nimmaḷina kī¨rttigaḷaliyalli nantatavinū niva
tātta gāṁbhī¨rya ntaṁtese viku vi kaḷā ḷā yutarinnū ssu yāpaśrūta
pāṁdhara viśru pama nassa satyāśraya tivisi ya rpar . Avaroḷ . śēṣagōtra śrī bāsitakī¨rttisāraya dhikōtsavaru
kānnaḷānadiravani ṇiyemā peṁpa yyanā sośaiya śrīyaracārya caritra dūra mi vaṇṇisa
hanenipo ppanedoṁdava¨ryya ke te paribhāvipoḍa¨rgge jagadhvanita ja nitatva ma
yoḷ . candramatidēvi hariścandramahipatiyā benana ye vana mita patigaḷa sukhya ya
jjaḍaṁ bhuvanajanāhade janimi gataviśāpa vibhu nācimayya jana ma vaṁsa vaṇa puṇyavati guṇavati rakṣisatigavakavanipa sama
Ava¨rgge janiyisidaṁ kā yadina nujanuddharisi dha¨rmma nātana tamma . guṇanidhi vibhu sagaṇa tai
ṇa bṛdhaṁ mahā nidāpraṇutariva dātta[¨rgge] varūpanepa rā va vārava
māramaṇijaniyo ca taṟadirame mābaladēvi ja niyiba Arivina kaṇi dha¨rma lavi sadācāradāgaraṁ māntanadode caṭṭena ga
matanagaṟagisade māciyakkanabaḷāratnaṁ . Āva si dēvigaha śrīmuṭṭigallacaṭṭadaṇḍādhīśaṁ tāmādarapa ¨rvvasu marasaṁstutyaranvayāni
nītasatyaru . kṛta vamātidanavanītaḷakenakannadānadiṁ taṇiya¨rcciyāpati sōma yōjanāyōnna tanagrajaneseva mallikā¨rjunabhaṭṭaṁ . tadanu
janakhiḷakaḷākōvidanudyad vēdaśāstravidanesedanidō vidhi sa¨rvvēśvara caṭṭadaṁṇḍanāyaka nudātta kī¨rttipatākaṁ . Āpū¨rvva vaḍetana jaṁ śrīpatnīpati
samasta vidyāpati vākśrīpati ni¨rmmaḷina yaśaśrīpati nāciyaṇacaṭṭaḍaṇḍādhīśaṁ . pati muṭṭa camūpati tatsutaṁ mūcamahānubhāvanenal
tatsatinoṁnnanoṁbeyaṁṇana tanū vaḷeḷeyoḷinnu munna Ā māciyakkanadhipa śrīmuṭṭaṁgalla caṭṭadaṁḍēśvaranuṁ tāvi¨rvvarumāḷōcisi
kāmitamaṁ tandarandu dha¨rmada deseyoḷ . Endu manadandādaḍaṁ caṁdalayavana māḍipa vorandiṁgaṁ kēḍilladudoṁdidaṁ dhā¨rmika janaṁgaḷoḷ voroḷ .
Endavari¨rvvaruṁ svajanabaṁdhujanayandu niṁdandanurāgadiṁdaleyapo¨rvadavaḷḷi mahāgrahāravā ndāvatīva yōgyarati dhā¨rmikaralliya viprara
ru diṭadiṁ vicāripaḍe nammadu nammavarella valida¨rvalidapiṁ dha¨rmmamanalli vaṁdyavenutaṁ śrīmāciyakkaṁ guṇāspade tatvāmiyanugrahaṁ baḍedu lō
kōtkaṣṭamappaṁte māḍidaḷatyū¨rjitadha¨rmmamaṁ harihararā¨rkkāvāsamaṁ bhāratīsudati sadmamananna śāleyaniḷādēvālayavrātamaṁ Ivu vo
lāgi Ā bhairavaniḷayaṁ berasuta trikūṭamanadanādivijādhīśana besadinde śvaka¨rmmavini¨rmmisida neṁbinagaṁ . lōkāśca¨ryyaṁ tānenalā kōmaḷe kamaḷa
nayane māḍisidaḷadaṁ nākīśanōḍiya mahīlōkādhipanayde pogāḻdumeṁ nā pake . Antā dha¨rmamavēnilanaṁ taraṇīndūgaḷu vuḷḷinaṁ śāśvataveṁ
bantāgire māḍisi tadanantaradoḷ tatrimū¨rtigaḷgaṁ dvija¨rgge . cāḷukyavikramāṁkanakāḷaṁ ṣaḍtriṁśadabdamene kharava¨rṣa kāḷaṁbina menipoḷpaṁ pāḷipu vai
śākhamāsadoḷpuṇṇameyoḷ . Amṛtāṁśuvāradoḷ nirupama vyatipātadoḷ mahōtsavadindaṁ samū¨rjita sōmagrahaṇaṁ samanise tadagaṇya
puṇyapāvanadinadoḷ . svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānaparāyaṇa¨rvvidita vēdavidyāpāragar . ṣaṭka¨rmmadha¨rmamā¨rgga
niratar . saptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṟitāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtōttamāṁgar dvātriṁśat sahasrasamayā gragaṇyarahitavidvaṁsakarāśritajanakaḷpa
vṛkṣar śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjarar . śrīmū¨rtinārāyaṇadēvalabdhavaraprasādāsāditā mahāmahīśvararappa śrīmanmahāgrahāra vaitiya
pū¨rvvadavaḷḷiyūroḍeya pramukhavaśēṣamahājanavi¨rnnū¨rvvaruṁ mūvadiṁba[¨rggā] vuṇḍugaḷuṁ bhuvanāga ṇagiyara sabhāmaṁṭapadalaśēṣaṁ nere
diddalli karuvara nāgava¨rmmagāvuṇḍanuṁ nā¨rggāvuṇḍugeyya ba naṁ sōvagāvuṇḍaṁga mātana maga boppagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ rakkasana magaṁ cikkagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ . basa
ntayana magaṁ hācagāvuṇḍaṁgaṁ krayamaṁkoṭṭu sabyāgasahitaṁ biṭṭa hosikālka¨rcci si koṇḍa bhūmige śrīmadinnūva¨rggamakṣōṇiyaṁ koṭṭu sa¨rvva
namaśyaṁ māḍi biṭṭa kramaventeṁdaḍe śrī muṭṭēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ veṇṇeyasabbana keṟeyiṁ keḷagaṇa ga¨rdde tōṁṭa ha¨rvvagōlamattaraydu . mattamādēva
¨rgge kaiyyabaḷiya naḍupaṭṭigēriyoḷagaṇa padināṟu kaiyagalada hattoṁbhattu kaiyya nīḷada maneyondu . © Ā dēvara pūjārigaḷi¨rvvara jīvita
kkaṁ muttaḷatiya mūraḍiyiṁ modal . hāḷahasugeya baḍagaṇasīme carasana śatadoḷahokka keni Alliṁ teṁka gaṁgarasa śata . Alliṁ teṁka
Udyāreya śata Alliṁ teṁka vonaśatadoḷ pokka kuni . Aṁteraḍu śatadagaladoḷaveraḍuṁ śatadoḷapokka kuniyoḷakūḍi pokka kisu hā¨rvagōla mattaru hattu . ©
mattamādēvara brahmapuriya brāhmaṇaru hanni¨rvva¨rggaṁ maiyyaloṁdu maneyaṁ koṭṭu mattamava¨rgge bhūmidānava mayya Aydu mattara lekkade koṭṭa
koṁḍaṁgeyi baḍagaṇasīme cāvarasana śatadoḷapokka kuni Alli teṁka gaṁgarasana śata Alliṁ teṁka Uddāra ta Alliṁ teṁkamānaśata . Alliṁ teṁka sōmayāji śatadoḷavoṁ
kka kuni Antu mūruśatadagaladaḷaveraḍu śatadoḷapokku kuneyoḷa ḍi pokku mattaraṟuvattu hiriyakkara . Ava¨rgge koṭṭa kaṁmmanege māḍida guṇa śā
sanavanenalā vṛttiyaṁtava¨rgge svādhīnaveṁdu ravumāralā bhā gita¨rggilla . piriyappana Ā vidya vi vṛtti . ka nippaguṇa jēṣṭavṛttisanava
ne vidvāṁsanappavaṁ mi kanu kiṟuviriyuvana radalli . Avara santānadoḷ yōgyarappavarārumilladoḍaṁ mattaṁ yōgyarappavayārayvuvṛttiyoḷ .
ttippa dhāpari kaṁ rāsvāna vi gaḷanā daliya samaṁtumīkramavu mana naṁ
pratipāḷisuvar . Antu dēvaraṁgabhōgaṁkkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ dōdi nikaraṁ gadde tōṭa haṁ ko ḍige samētaṁ mūḻvarā
lamaḷaveyda mattareppattaydu harvigolada sa¨rvvabādhāparihāraṁ sa¨rvanamaśyaṁ māḍi biṭṭar roḍeyapramu
kha¨rssakaḷārādhyarene nikhiḷa kaḷārājitarucitadha¨rmmamā¨rggānu dha¨rma nidēsa¨rvvimaḷa
parihāradāraṁ sa¨rvasamaśyaṁ naramānaddharadhar . Innū¨rvvar bhūmige teṟe yaṁ ra kuḷiya suṁka taṁmma mannaṇe bhu
ḷgāḍavaṇavaḷivannayamarasthā pānuṁgal grāmānyantakadiṁ hunāmado pesariṭṭuko kyaḷavanitaṁ tāmāgadantu vipula Ā mara
tatu dha[¨rma]ḷa svadha¨rmmavanā [pa .] mattamā mahāsati mahānubhāvi mācaladēvi Ūroḍeya pramukhavaśēṣamahājanavinnūvva¨rgge rakṣaṇeya
koṭṭa dēveraḍu baṁdikaṁ . yahinevaḍeda vāraduṁ khaṁḍikavaṇanālva khaṁḍika kavūra pārikhāysadali¨rvvatu nālku gadyāṇa ponnaninnū¨rvvadṛvā
khaṁḍikarupādhyāya¨rgge kṣiṇeyavasaṁprati koṭṭu tāvvayoḍematāgina ppuvāgi¨rvviṭṭar . daṁṟiṁdi dha¨rmmannūrvaradava¨rgge dātāra
rā bhūviditavabhūbhūta venunutaṇasedudiḷā dāna naśa naṁdideṟe mahā
kya vinnū¨rvvara bāmē vibhāśippane tsabha .
tyagemāppa bhaktiyaniḷātyā kaṁ do sa¨rmi
Digital edition of SII 35.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
